data.title: Trump-linked World Liberty Financial’s USD1 to Close Binance’s $2B Deal
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 08, 2025-World Liberty Financial’s (WLFI) stablecoin, USD1, is set to close the $2 billion investment deal between Binance and the Abu Dhabi investment firm MGX. The announcement was made by WLFI co-founder Zach Witkoff at the Token2049 conference in Dubai, where he confirmed USD1 will be the “official” stablecoin used to finalize […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/trump-linked-world-liberty-financials-usd1-to-close-binances-2b-deal

data.title: Movement Labs Suspends Co-Founder Rushi Manche Amid Market-Making Scandal
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 08, 2025-Movement Labs has suspended its co-founder, Rushi Manche, following the ongoing investigation into a market-making scandal involving its MOVE token. The suspension came as the company awaits the results of a third-party review conducted by Groom Lake regarding governance issues and the controversial actions of a market maker. The controversy began […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/movement-labs-suspends-co-founder-rushi-manche-amid-market-making-scandal

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates Bitcoin Investment for Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor, Chairman of the Board at Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), suggested in an interview with Saudi National Television that the Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund should invest in Bitcoin. Saylor emphasized that purchasing Bitcoin could potentially increase the fund's value significantly, stating, "If you want your money to grow a thousandfold, then buy Bitcoin." The Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund is reported to have assets totaling $930 billion.

data.title: Safeheron launches open source TEE framework based on Intel SGX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset infrastructure provider Safeheron has officially released an open source trusted execution environment (TEE) framework based on Intel SGX SDK, aiming to enhance the security and privacy protection of Web3 fields such as DeFi, payment, and DAO. The framework is developed using modern C++ and can create a secure "enclave" in any cloud service that supports Intel SGX. Safeheron said that the current industry is increasingly concerned about closed systems, so it decided to open source the framework to accelerate ecological innovation. Its customers include MetaMask, Doo Group and Amber Group, and the cumulative transfer amount has exceeded US$10 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Swiss Blockchain Leaders Unveil 12-Point Crypto Strategy
data.description:

The strategy aims to make Switzerland more appealing for new ideas, money, and crypto education. Smarter Crypto Regulations One of the strategy’s main goals is to enhance the country’s regulatory environment
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/bitcoin-and-crypto-guide/swiss-blockchain-leaders-unveil-12-point-crypto-strategy/

data.title: Oregon Updates Commercial Code to Include Digital Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, Oregon Governor Tina Kotek signed Senate Bill 167 on May 7, updating the state's commercial regulations to align with the Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) by incorporating provisions related to digital assets. The new legislation introduces Article 12 of the UCC, establishing a legal framework for cryptocurrencies, tokenized records, and electronic money. It also amends Article 9 of the UCC to allow digital assets to be used as collateral in secured transactions. Additionally, the bill recognizes the legal validity of electronic records, electronic signatures, and hybrid transactions to support digital commerce development. The new regulations include transitional provisions to ensure that transactions conducted before the law's enactment remain legally valid and provide a one-year grace period for existing security interests to comply.

Another cryptocurrency-related bill in Oregon, House Bill 2071, is still in the legislative process and has not yet reached the voting stage. This bill aims to protect the rights to use Bitcoin and other digital assets by prohibiting state and local governments from restricting individuals from accepting cryptocurrency as payment for goods or services and ensuring the legality of peer-to-peer blockchain transactions. Currently, Oregon has not proposed legislation to establish a state Bitcoin reserve, unlike some other states.

data.title: Binance Wallet ranks first in transaction volume, accounting for 80% of the total transaction volume of mainstream wallets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Dune data, Binance Wallet's transaction volume has accounted for 82.1% of the total transaction volume of mainstream crypto wallets, ranking first. Next is OKX Wallet/DEX, which accounts for 3%, TokenPocket accounts for 2.4%, Phantom accounts for 2.3%, Bitget Wallet accounts for 1.7%, Coinbase accounts for 1.6%, and MetaMask accounts for 0.7%.
However, according to the number of active transaction addresses, OKX Wallet API accounts for 20.4%, ranking first, and Binance Wallet accounts for 19.7%, ranking second.

data.title: Whale Address Resumes Staking with 20,000 SOL After Nine-Month Hiatus
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale address has resumed activity by staking 20,000 SOL after approximately nine months of inactivity. At the current market price, this amount is valued at around $3.02 million. The total staked amount from this address now stands at 128,384 SOL, with an estimated total value of $19.6 million.

data.title: Ethereum's Valuation Compared to Bitcoin Suggests Potential Undervaluation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent analysis by CryptoQuant indicates that the ETH/BTC MVRV ratio suggests Ethereum is significantly undervalued compared to Bitcoin, marking the first occurrence since 2019. Historically, such conditions have often led to Ethereum outperforming Bitcoin. However, factors such as supply pressure, weak demand, and subdued activity may hinder a potential rebound.

The MVRV (Market Value to Realized Value) ratio is a metric used to assess an asset's market value against its 'real value,' typically based on the average cost held by investors. The ETH/BTC MVRV ratio reflects the market value of Ethereum relative to Bitcoin compared to their realized values.

Analysis of historical data shows that when the ETH/BTC MVRV ratio falls into the undervaluation zone, as seen in 2019, Ethereum tends to exhibit strong performance relative to Bitcoin, often resulting in price increases. Currently, in 2025, the ETH/BTC MVRV ratio has again dropped to the undervaluation zone, approximately around 0.4, indicating that Ethereum might be undervalued compared to Bitcoin.

data.title: Bybit held a flagship institutional seminar in TOKEN2049 week to promote the integration of traditional finance and crypto ecology
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto exchange Bybit successfully held its flagship Institutional Symposium at the successful conclusion of TOKEN2049 Week. This symposium is an exclusive invitation-only event aimed at deepening connections between institutions and promoting collaborative innovation in the crypto field.
Shunyet Jan, head of Bybit's institutional and derivatives business, said: "Bybit's number of institutional customers increased by 100% in 2024, and the number of active institutions exceeded 2,000, which fully reflects the market's high trust in our platform. Our OTC settlement cooperation with Zodia Custody further responds to the industry's concerns about security, and we work with partners such as Fireblocks and Copper to provide customers with secure custody services that meet institutional standards."
During the event, industry leaders expressed their insights, including Paul Kremsky, head of business development at Cumberland, Jordi Alexander, CEO of Selini Capital, and Dom Longman, managing director of Zodia Custody Middle East and Africa. Their participation highlights the important role of institutional power in shaping the future of crypto and the evolving role of regulated institutions as a bridge between traditional finance and digital assets.
Shunyet Jan added: “This workshop aims to deepen relationships and create a space for institutions to jointly explore future visions. Through open discussions and collaborative opportunities, we are jointly laying a solid foundation for future growth.”

data.title: Astar proposes to modify token economics to fix maximum token supply
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Astar initiated a proposal related to token economics, planning to transform the ASTR token model from dynamic inflation to a model with a fixed maximum supply. The proposal aims to gradually reduce token emissions by introducing an emission decay function, significantly reduce network inflation, and plans to stabilize the highest annualized yield of DApp staking at 11-14% in the next two years to prepare for the next brand upgrade.
In addition, the proposal recommends the establishment of Protocol-Owned Liquidity (POL) managed by the Astar Finance Committee (AFC) and the destruction of 50% of network transaction fees to enhance the long-term economic value and network independence of ASTR.

data.title: Whales continue to stake 20,000 SOL after 9 months, and the total stake is now 128,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, a whale address re-pledged 20,000 SOL after being silent for about 9 months, which is equivalent to about 3.02 million US dollars at the current price. The total amount of staked by this address has reached 128,384 SOL, with a total staked value of about 19.6 million US dollars.

data.title: Is Binance Still Relevant? ALPACA Crypto Blasts +65% Without Binance Support
data.description:
Drama over the past few weeks saw Binance de-list ALPACA crypto from the exchange, with the token suspiciously shooting up over 20x leading into the de-listing date. Many within the crypto community called foul play by Binance, believing its market makers were pumping and dumping the coin, extracting as much liquidity as possible from ALPACA.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/is-binance-still-relevant-alpaca-crypto-blasts-65-without-binance-support/
